name: Gallery Intro + Filter Pills
description: The header for the gallery page. Displays a centered title and description, followed by category filter pills that filter the masonry grid below.

field_schema.label: Eyebrow
field_schema.help: A small, uppercase label displayed above the main heading.

field_schema.label: Heading
field_schema.help: The primary title of the section.

field_schema.label: Body
field_schema.help: The main descriptive text for this section.

field_schema.label: Filter Categories
field_schema.help: Pills that filter the masonry grid. Must match the categories used on photos in the Gallery Masonry block.

sub_fields.label: Label
sub_fields.help: Category name shown on the pill (e.g. Street Food).

test_data.heading: Ten years of candid Vietnam.
test_data.body: Every trip, every laugh, every bowl of phở at 6am. The real imagery behind every page on this site.
